findings: After del + empty_cache() = 457 MB — DID NOT CLEAR
Previous tenant data readable in VRAM on shared cloud GPU

security_issues.description: 457 MB computation data remains in VRAM after graceful exit. Next tenant on shared cloud GPU can read previous tenant model weights and tensor data.

conclusion: Graceful PyTorch exit leaves 457 MB uncleared. Multi-tenant cloud security risk.
